title: Baobing Custard Creams
description: A unique fusion of traditional Chinese baobing with creamy custard. A delicate balance of flavors and textures.
instructions: 1. In a medium saucepan, combine custard and vanilla extract. Heat over low heat, whisking constantly.
2. In a separate bowl, mix shaved ice and red bean paste until well combined.
3. Pour the custard mixture over the shaved ice mixture and stir until the mixture is smooth.
4. Spoon the mixture into individual serving cups or bowls.
5. Chill in the refrigerator until set.
6. Serve immediately, garnished with additional shaved ice and a drizzle of red bean paste if desired.
